commands.title: Connect Device
commands.description: Connect ADB to a device serial or host:port.

commands.title: Doctor
commands.description: Run environment and receiver diagnostics.

commands.title: Start Session
commands.description: Start a new runtime session and capture lane.

commands.title: Stop Session
commands.description: Stop the current runtime session.

commands.title: Session Status
commands.description: Show state file and capture lane status.

commands.title: Session Doctor
commands.description: Run doctor via session command group.

commands.title: Resume to Screen
commands.description: Bring app foreground and jump to target screen.

commands.title: Probe Start Phase
commands.description: Mark deterministic probe phase start for guided capture.

commands.title: Probe Stop Phase
commands.description: Stop active probe phase marker.

commands.title: Probe Status
commands.description: Show current local probe/scope runtime state.

commands.title: Open Screen
commands.description: Open mapped app screen by debug receiver.

commands.title: Open URL
commands.description: Open URL in app via debug receiver.

commands.title: Reset Site State
commands.description: Clear cookies and origin storage for a specific site URL.

commands.title: Open Detail
commands.description: Open detail context by work key/title.

commands.title: Tap by Regex
commands.description: Tap UI anchor by regex matching label.

commands.title: Anchor Scan
commands.description: Scan and list clickable anchors.

commands.title: Anchor Create
commands.description: Create a manual overlay anchor for correlation.

commands.title: Anchor Label
commands.description: Update anchor name/type for an existing overlay anchor.

commands.title: Anchor Remove
commands.description: Remove an overlay anchor by ID.

commands.title: Flow Run
commands.description: Run a predefined UI flow script.

commands.title: Start Capture
commands.description: Start capture lanes and runtime session.

commands.title: Stop Capture
commands.description: Stop capture and session lanes.

commands.title: Snapshot
commands.description: Pull events/response store and derive indexes.

commands.title: Lanes
commands.description: List running tmux capture lanes.

commands.title: MITM On
commands.description: Start mitmproxy bridge lane.

commands.title: MITM Off
commands.description: Stop mitmproxy bridge lane.

commands.title: MITM Status
commands.description: Show mitmproxy bridge status.

commands.title: Trace Query
commands.description: Query trace events with DSL filters.

commands.title: Trace Tail
commands.description: Tail recent trace events.

commands.title: Trace Export
commands.description: Export filtered trace events as JSONL.

commands.title: Trace Correlate
commands.description: Build UI↔network correlation index.

commands.title: Trace Diff
commands.description: Diff two trace export JSONL files.

commands.title: Provenance Query
commands.description: Query provenance events with phase/host filters.

commands.title: Provenance Graph
commands.description: Render current provenance graph artifact.

commands.title: Provenance Export
commands.description: Export filtered provenance events as JSONL.

commands.title: Start Triage
commands.description: Start live triage session and build current anomaly set.

commands.title: Live Tail
commands.description: Tail live triage stream using current focus/session settings.

commands.title: Focus View
commands.description: Focus triage to a usecase, trace chain, or filter scope.

commands.title: Anomaly Hotlist
commands.description: Show sorted anomaly alerts by severity and recency.

commands.title: Bookmark Chain
commands.description: Bookmark a triage-relevant event or correlated chain.

commands.title: Export Incident Pack
commands.description: Build reproducible incident bundle with correlated artifacts.

commands.title: Stop Triage
commands.description: Stop current triage session.

commands.title: Build Replay Seed
commands.description: Create replay seed from incident bundle or filtered runtime events.

commands.title: Create Baseline
commands.description: Create a named replay baseline set from current selected events.

commands.title: List Baselines
commands.description: List available named baselines and active baseline reference.

commands.title: Run Replay
commands.description: Execute deterministic replay runner using seed data.

commands.title: Diff vs Baseline
commands.description: Compare selected runtime signature set against named baseline.

commands.title: Build Replay Report
commands.description: Build warn-then-block replay report combining diff and run metadata.

commands.title: Native Request
commands.description: Execute a mapper-owned native replay request with Cronet/OkHttp transport.

commands.title: Cookie Timeline
commands.description: Show cookie timeline and domain stats.

commands.title: Set Events
commands.description: Show cookie set events.

commands.title: Refresh Events
commands.description: Show cookie refresh/rotation events.

commands.title: Domain View
commands.description: Show cookies grouped by domain.

commands.title: Infer Required Headers
commands.description: Infer frequently required headers per host.

commands.title: Infer Required (Active)
commands.description: Replay-elimination style minimal header inference per endpoint.

commands.title: Token Dependencies
commands.description: Inspect token/auth related header dependencies.

commands.title: Auth Chain
commands.description: Inspect auth-related event chain.

commands.title: Response Raw
commands.description: Show one response event by event ID.

commands.title: Response Filter
commands.description: Filter response events by DSL.

commands.title: Response Grep
commands.description: Regex-search response body previews.

commands.title: Response Sample
commands.description: Sample compact response entries.

commands.title: Candidate Endpoints
commands.description: Show inferred endpoint candidates.

commands.title: Field Matrix
commands.description: Generate field matrix from responses.

commands.title: Profile Draft
commands.description: Generate site profile draft.

commands.title: Provider Draft Export
commands.description: Generate FishIT-Player-ready provider draft export.

commands.title: Replay Seed
commands.description: Generate replay seed from captured requests.

commands.title: Pack
commands.description: Create compressed runtime pack archive.

commands.title: Compress
commands.description: Create compressed runtime archive.

commands.title: Reindex
commands.description: Rebuild derived indexes and reports.

commands.title: Validate
commands.description: Evaluate pipeline-ready quality gates for the current dataset.

commands.description: Generate mission_export_summary.json with readiness and missing evidence.

commands.description: Delete runtime event/index stores in current run.

commands.description: Install/update toolkit dependencies.

commands.description: Configure strict target host scope for runtime capture.

commands.title: Show Scope
commands.description: Show configured scope state from runtime state file.

commands.description: Start mission-first wizard session.

commands.title: Wizard Status
commands.description: Read current mission wizard state from app runtime.

commands.description: Bind target URL and open it in browser context.

commands.description: Advance to next wizard step when current is saturated.

commands.description: Reset current wizard step to INCOMPLETE for retry.

commands.description: Skip current optional wizard step.

commands.description: Finalize wizard session and run pull/reindex/validate by default.

commands.title: Mark Provenance
commands.description: Write a manual provenance marker event.

commands.title: Doctor
commands.description: Run doctor check from settings.
